metadata.name: Report a Lost and Found Item

description: A student has found a wallet on campus and wants to turn it in.

nodes.task_description: Direct the student to the nearest lost and found location (e.g., campus safety office, student union desk).
Log the found item in the lost and found database, including description and location found.

expected_outcome.value: The receiving agent creates a record for the found wallet.

nodes.task_description: If an ID is in the wallet, attempt to look up the owner and send them a notification.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the owner's student record and sends an email that their wallet has been found.
